name: Kevin Bennett Bus
districts_or_customers: likely Oskaloosa Community School District or local Mahaska County routes (unconfirmed)
recent_news: No web footprint found; appears to be a single-route owner-operator with no website, news, or directory listing beyond a phone record.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-owner operation (~2 employees, ~$71K revenue). Too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in on its own; only relevant as part of an Iowa roll-up.

name: Major Transportation
districts_or_customers: Dorchester County, MD (likely Dorchester County Public Schools contractor based on MD's contractor model)
recent_news: Listed in directories (Manta, Chamber of Commerce, Annapolis Directions) as a school bus transportation service at 837 Fairmount Ave, Cambridge, MD. No recent news or website. Note: FMCSA USDOT 1619226 'Major Transportation Services Inc' is an unrelated freight carrier.
fit_notes: Very small Eastern Shore family operator in MD's contractor-route model. Sub-scale on its own but Dorchester County contractor routes could bolt onto a regional MD tuck-in roll-up for Summit.

name: Dorsey's Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: Kent County Public Schools, MD (historical, ~60 years)
recent_news: Curtis and Anna Mae Dorsey retired in Nov 2012 after 60 years of Kent County school/charter bus service; Curtis Dorsey died Jan 3, 2013. Phone listing persists in directories but operating status post-retirement is unclear; likely wound down or transferred.
fit_notes: Not a viable tuck-in target - founders retired 2012 and Curtis Dorsey deceased 2013; business appears dormant/wound down. Skip.

name: Adair's Bus Svc

recent_news: No web footprint, website, or news coverage found. Residential address (5714 Doulton Dr) suggests micro/home-based operation.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-owner/single-employee operation registered at a residential address. Not a viable standalone Summit tuck-in target.

name: Citicare Inc
districts_or_customers: Avoca School District 37 (special education transportation contract)
other north-suburban Chicago school districts (Lake Zurich/Northbrook/Buffalo Grove/Schaumburg footprint)
recent_news: BBB profile opened 2011; B- rating. Active in Chicago north-suburban special education and medical transportation. Operates from Lake Zurich with service presence in Northbrook, Buffalo Grove, Schaumburg.
fit_notes: Niche special-needs/SPED transportation contractor in affluent north-Chicago suburbs - exactly the high-margin SPED segment Summit pursues. Worth a sourcing call to assess fleet size, contract base (Avoca 37 confirmed) and owner appetite; revenue base likely understated in source data.
